clean_content: sacred) fire. Oblations should be made with the recitation of the following mantra and the name of the deity invoked should be mentioned. One who practices this vow would get the place of Indra and would be happy in heaven. One who gives a cow at the end of the year would get the place of Indra and would be happy in heaven. I don't know what the Narada Purana says about the Padma Purana.
